rulings.Case Title: 2856-62 WASHINGTON STREET HOME OWNERS VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEPARTMENT OF

DEFENDANT IN INTERVENTION 2856-62 WASHINGTON STREET HOME OWNERS' ASSOCIATION, DANIEL MULDERRY, GAYLEN MULDERRY, PETER DUBOIS, LESLIE ZIMMERMAN, HENRIETTA HAGOPIAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IN INTERVENTION continued to July 22, 2016. rulings.Case Title: ANNE EVANS ET AL VS. BONNIE MOORE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION / Plaintiffs' Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 29, 2016, line 3. PLAINTIFF ANNE EVANS, CAROLE COPLAN's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION denied. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b). ("¿ the specific cause of action, affirmative defense, claims for damages, or issues of duty must be stated specifically in the notice of motion and be repeated, verbatim, in the separate statement of undisputed material facts.") Additionally, triable issues of fact exist as to facts 13, 17, 18 and 19. "If there is even one triable issue of fact, summary judgment cannot be rendered. Wells Fargo Bank v. Kincaid, 260 Cal. App. 2d 120, 123. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANNE EVANS ET AL VS. BONNIE MOORE ET AL

("¿ the specific cause of action, affirmative defense, claims for damages, or issues of duty must be stated specifically in the notice of motion and be repeated, verbatim, in the separate statement of undisputed material facts.") Additionally, triable issues of fact exist as to fact 6. "If there is even one triable issue of fact, summary judgment cannot be rendered. Wells Fargo Bank v. Kincaid, 260 Cal.
